[]
Variants
Price:

list.arch:
<tree string="Products" sample="1">
                    <field name="default_code" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="list_price"/>
                    <field name="taxes_id" widget="many2many_tags"/>
                    <field name="supplier_taxes_id" widget="many2many_tags"/>
                    <field name="activity_exception_decoration" widget="activity_exception"/>
                </tree>

search.arch:
<search string="Product">
                <field name="name" string="Product" filter_domain="['|', '|', '|', ('default_code', 'ilike', self), ('product_variant_ids.default_code', 'ilike', self),('name', 'ilike', self), ('barcode', 'ilike', self)]"/>
                <field name="categ_id" filter_domain="[('categ_id', 'child_of', raw_value)]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Services" name="services" domain="[('type','=','service')]"/>
                <filter string="Products" name="consumable" domain="[('type', 'in', ['consu', 'product'])]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Can be Sold" name="filter_to_sell" domain="[('sale_ok','=',True)]"/>
                <filter string="Can be Purchased" name="filter_to_purchase" domain="[('purchase_ok', '=', True)]"/>
                <separator/>
                <field string="Attributes" name="attribute_line_ids"/>
                <filter invisible="1" string="Late Activities" name="activities_overdue" domain="[('my_activity_date_deadline', '<', context_today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]" help="Show all records which has next action date is before today"/>
                <filter invisible="1" string="Today Activities" name="activities_today" domain="[('my_activity_date_deadline', '=', context_today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))]"/>
                <filter invisible="1" string="Future Activities" name="activities_upcoming_all" domain="[('my_activity_date_deadline', '>', context_today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'))                     ]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Favorites" name="favorites" domain="[('priority','=','1')]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Warnings" name="activities_exception" domain="[('activity_exception_decoration', '!=', False)]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Archived" name="inactive" domain="[('active','=',False)]"/>
                <group expand="1" string="Group By">
                    <filter string="Product Type" name="type" context="{'group_by':'detailed_type'}"/>
                    <filter string="Product Category" name="categ_id" context="{'group_by':'categ_id'}"/>
                </group>
            </search>

activity.arch: []

tree_default.arch:
<tree string="Product" multi_edit="1" sample="1">
            <header>
                <button string="Print Labels" type="object" name="action_open_label_layout"/>
            </header>
                <field name="product_variant_count" column_invisible="True"/>
                <field name="sale_ok" column_invisible="True"/>
                <field name="currency_id" column_invisible="True"/>
                <field name="cost_currency_id" column_invisible="True"/>
                <field name="priority" widget="priority" optional="show" nolabel="1"/>
                <field name="name" string="Product Name"/>
                <field name="default_code" optional="show" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="responsible_id" widget="many2one_avatar_user" optional="hide" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="product_tag_ids" widget="many2many_tags" optional="show" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="barcode" optional="hide" readonly="product_variant_count != 1"/>
                
                <field name="list_price" string="Sales Price" widget="monetary" options="{'currency_field': 'currency_id'}" optional="show" decoration-muted="not sale_ok"/>
                <field name="standard_price" widget="monetary" options="{'currency_field': 'cost_currency_id'}" optional="show" readonly="1"/>
                <field name="categ_id" optional="hide" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="detailed_type" optional="hide" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                <field name="type" column_invisible="True" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="show_on_hand_qty_status_button" column_invisible="True"/>
                    <field name="qty_available" invisible="not show_on_hand_qty_status_button" string="On Hand" optional="show" decoration-danger="qty_available < 0"/>
                    <field name="virtual_available" invisible="not show_on_hand_qty_status_button" string="Forecasted" optional="show" decoration-danger="virtual_available < 0" decoration-bf="1"/>
                
                <field name="active" column_invisible="True"/>
                <field name="activity_exception_decoration" widget="activity_exception"/>
            </tree>

form__res_currency.arch:
This is your company's currency.
This currency has already been used to generate accounting entries.
Changing its rounding factor now will not change the rounding made on previous entries; possibly causing an inconsistency with the new ones.

form__product_template_attribute_line.arch:
<form string="Product Attribute and Values">
                <group name="main_field">
                    <label for="attribute_id" string="Attribute Name"/>
                    <field name="attribute_id" nolabel="1" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                    <field name="value_ids" widget="one2many" can_create="True" can_write="True">
                        <tree string="Values">
                            <field name="name"/>
                            <field name="html_color"/>
                        </tree>
                        <form string="Values">
                            <field name="name"/>
                        </form>
                    </field>
                </group>
            </form>

form__product_tag.arch:
<form string="Product Tag">
                <sheet>
                    <group>
                        <field name="name"/>
                    </group>
                    <notebook>
                        <page string="Product Templates" name="page_product_templates">
                            <field name="product_template_ids" context="{'tree_view_ref':'product.product_template_view_tree_tag'}" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"><tree string="Product Templates" editable="bottom">
                    <field name="name" readonly="1"/>
                    <field name="default_code" readonly="1" optional="show" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="description" readonly="1" optional="show"/>
                </tree></field>
                        </page>
                        <page string="Product Variants" name="page_product_variants">
                            <field name="product_product_ids" context="{'tree_view_ref':'product.product_product_view_tree_tag'}" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"><tree string="Product Variants" editable="bottom">
                    <field name="name" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="default_code" readonly="1" optional="show" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="product_template_variant_value_ids" widget="many2many_tags" readonly="1"/>
                    <field name="description" readonly="1" optional="show" on_change="1"/>
                </tree></field>
                        </page>
                        <page string="All Products" name="page_all_products" invisible="not product_ids">
                            <field name="product_ids" context="{'tree_view_ref':'product.product_product_view_tree_tag'}"><tree string="Product Variants" editable="bottom">
                    <field name="name" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="default_code" readonly="1" optional="show" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="product_template_variant_value_ids" widget="many2many_tags" readonly="1"/>
                    <field name="description" readonly="1" optional="show" on_change="1"/>
                </tree></field>
                        </page>
                    </notebook>
                </sheet>
            </form>

form__res_currency_rate.arch:

                    <sheet>
                        <group>
                            <group>
                                <field name="name" on_change="1"/>
                                
                                <field name="company_rate" digits="[12,12]" on_change="1"/>
                                <field name="inverse_company_rate" digits="[12,12]" on_change="1"/>
                            </group>
                            <group>
                                <field name="currency_id" on_change="1"/>
                                
                            </group>
                        </group>
                    </sheet>
                </form>

form__product_removal.arch:
<form string="Removal" create="False" delete="False" edit="False">
                <group col="4">
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="method"/>
                </group>
           </form>

form__uom_category.arch:
<form string="Units of Measure categories">
                <sheet>
                    <group>
                        <field name="name"/>
                        <field name="reference_uom_id" invisible="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                    </group>
                    <notebook>
                        <page string="Units of Measure" name="uom_lines">
                            <field name="uom_ids" force_save="1" context="{'default_uom_type': 'smaller', 'default_category_id': id}" on_change="1">
                                <tree editable="bottom">
                                    <field name="name" decoration-bf="uom_type == 'reference'"/>
                                    <field name="uom_type" decoration-bf="uom_type == 'reference'" on_change="1"/>
                                    <field name="factor" column_invisible="True" on_change="1"/>
                                    <field name="factor_inv" column_invisible="True" on_change="1"/>
                                    <field name="ratio" string="Ratio" readonly="uom_type == 'reference'" digits="[42,5]"/>
                                    <field name="active"/>
                                    <field name="rounding" digits="[42, 5]" on_change="1"/>
                                </tree>
                            </field>
                        </page>
                    </notebook>
                </sheet>
            </form>

form__account_tax_repartition_line.arch:
<form><sheet string="Tax Repartition Line"><group><group><field name="factor_percent" on_change="1"/><field name="repartition_type" on_change="1"/><field name="account_id" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/></group><group><field name="factor"/><field name="document_type"/></group></group><group><field name="tag_ids" can_create="False" can_write="False"><tree string="Tags" create="False" delete="False" edit="False">
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="applicability"/>
                    <field name="country_id"/>
                </tree></field></group><group><group><field name="tax_id" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/><field name="sequence"/></group><group><field name="company_id"/><field name="use_in_tax_closing"/></group></group><group><separator/></group></sheet></form>

form__account_tax_group.arch:
<form string="Account Tax Group">
                    <field name="company_id" invisible="1" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                    <sheet>
                        <group>
                            <group>
                                <field name="name"/>
                                <field name="country_id" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                                
                                <field name="sequence"/>
                            </group>
                            <group>
                                <field name="tax_payable_account_id" domain="[('company_id', '=', company_id)]" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                                <field name="tax_receivable_account_id" domain="[('company_id', '=', company_id)]" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                                <field name="advance_tax_payment_account_id" domain="[('company_id', '=', company_id)]" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                                <field name="preceding_subtotal"/>
                            </group>
                        </group>
                    </sheet>
                </form>

                            </tree>
                        </field>
                    </group>
                </sheet>
            </form>

form__calendar_recurrence.arch:
<form><sheet string="Event Recurrence Rule"><group><group><field name="name"/></group><group><field name="base_event_id" can_create="True" can_write="True"/></group></group><group><field name="calendar_event_ids" on_change="1"><tree string="Meetings" sample="1" multi_edit="1">
                <header>
                    <button name="action_open_composer" type="object" context="{'default_composition_mode':'mass_mail'}" string="Send Mail"/>
                <button name="action_send_sms" type="object" string="Send SMS"/>
                </header>
                <field name="name" string="Subject" decoration-bf="1" readonly="recurrency"/>
                <field name="start" string="Start Date" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                <field name="stop" string="End Date" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                <field name="user_id" widget="many2one_avatar_user" readonly="recurrency" optional="hide" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="partner_ids" widget="many2many_tags" readonly="recurrency" optional="show" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="alarm_ids" widget="many2many_tags" optional="hide" readonly="recurrency" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="categ_ids" widget="many2many_tags" optional="hide" readonly="recurrency" options="{'color_field': 'color'}" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                <field name="recurrency" optional="hide" readonly="1"/>
                <field name="privacy" optional="hide" readonly="recurrency"/>
                <field name="show_as" optional="hide" readonly="recurrency"/>
                <field name="location" optional="show" readonly="recurrency"/>
                <field name="duration" widget="float_time" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                <field name="description" optional="hide" readonly="recurrency"/>
                <field name="allday" column_invisible="True"/>
                <field name="message_needaction" column_invisible="True"/>
            </tree></field></group><group><group><field name="event_tz"/><field name="dtstart"/><field name="end_type" on_change="1"/><field name="count" on_change="1"/><field name="tue" on_change="1"/><field name="thu" on_change="1"/><field name="sat" on_change="1"/><field name="month_by" on_change="1"/><field name="weekday" on_change="1"/><field name="until" on_change="1"/></group><group><field name="rrule" on_change="1"/><field name="rrule_type" on_change="1"/><field name="interval" on_change="1"/><field name="mon" on_change="1"/><field name="wed" on_change="1"/><field name="fri" on_change="1"/><field name="sun" on_change="1"/><field name="day" on_change="1"/><field name="byday" on_change="1"/><field name="trigger_id" can_create="True" can_write="True"/></group></group><group><separator/></group></sheet></form>

                    <field name="city" optional="show"/>
                    <field name="state_id" optional="hide" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="country_id" optional="show" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="vat" optional="hide" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                <field name="ubl_cii_format" string="EDI Format" optional="hide"/>
                    <field name="category_id" optional="hide" widget="many2many_tags" options="{'color_field': 'color'}" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                    
                    <field name="is_company" column_invisible="True" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="parent_id" readonly="1" column_invisible="True" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="active" column_invisible="True"/>
                </tree>

list__res_partner_bank.arch:
<tree string="Bank Accounts" multi_edit="1">
                    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
                    <field name="acc_number"/>
                    <field name="bank_name" string="Bank"/>
                    
                    <field name="partner_id" on_change="1" can_create="True" can_write="True"/>
                    <field name="acc_holder_name" column_invisible="True"/>
                    <field name="allow_out_payment" widget="boolean_toggle"/>
                </tree>

list__res_users.arch:
<tree string="Users" multi_edit="1">
                    <field name="name" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="login" readonly="1" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="lang" on_change="1"/>
                    <field name="login_date" readonly="1"/>
                    
                    <field name="state" widget="badge" decoration-info="state == 'new'" decoration-success="state == 'active'"/>
                </tree>

list__stock_route.arch:
<tree string="Routes">
                    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="active" column_invisible="True"/>
                    
                </tree>

list__stock_rule.arch:
<tree string="Rules">
                    <field name="action"/>
                    <field name="location_src_id" options="{'no_create': True}"/>
                    <field name="location_dest_id" options="{'no_create': True}"/>
                    <field name="route_id" on_change="1"/>
                    
                </tree>

list__stock_warehouse.arch:
<tree string="Warehouse">
                    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="active" column_invisible="True"/>
                    
                    <field name="partner_id"/>
                    
                </tree>

list__uom_uom.arch:
<tree string="Units of Measure" create="false">
                <field name="name"/>
                <field name="category_id" on_change="1"/>
                <field name="uom_type" on_change="1"/>
            </tree>
